excerpt:
Washington, D.C. (April 30, 2026) — This morning, Andrew Lohn, Senior Fellow at Georgetown University’s Center for Security and Emerging Technology (CSET), testified before the U.S.-China Economic and Security Review Commission. The hearing, “Taking a Bigger Byte: China’s Expanding Strategy for Data Dominance,” examined the drivers and methods behind China’s data acquisition strategy at large, […]

The post CSET Senior Fellow Andrew Lohn Testifies Before U.S.-China Economic and Security Review Commission appeared first on Center for Security and Emerging Technology.
